texto: (Excerpt from Psalm 20 reflection)A BlessingMay the Lord make himself real when you need Him mostMay the power of his name protect youMay he send help from his legions on earthAnd in the heavensMay he remember all your giftsAnd reward your offeringsMay he make your wildest dreams come true,Your plans successfulMay we shout with joy over your accomplishments,Singing praises to our GodMay God answer all your prayers
explicacao: Citação de Carol Shelton Moye sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “(Excerpt from Psalm 20 reflection)A BlessingMay the Lord make himself real when you need Him most…” articula motivacao, blessing, psalm-20 em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como termino e psalm-20.
